evals.prompt: Turn docs/release-readiness.md into a single HTMDX decision brief. Save it to artifacts/release-readiness.html and make the release recommendation, blockers, and evidence easy to scan.
evals.expected_output: Creates one portable HTML artifact from the supplied source, uses the pinned template and valid components, preserves evidence, and separates structural checks from rendered proof.

evals.prompt: Update the metrics and Q4 milestone in artifacts/platform-health.html. Keep the existing HTMDX shell and runtime version unchanged.
evals.expected_output: Edits only the canonical HTMDX source and browser title if needed, preserves the existing shell and runtime, and verifies the saved artifact.

evals.prompt: Visualize how auth, billing, and notifications depend on the user service.
evals.expected_output: Does not force HTMDX for an unqualified visualization request and routes to the host's native visualization capability.
